title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Punjab National Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Punjab National Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Punjab National Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Punjab National Bank:
Punjab National Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank!
